title: No Villager Profession Lock
description: A mod that simply removes the profession lock of the villagers after making an trade with them.
body:
A extremely simple mod that took me 8 hours to figure out most of the game's code.

This mod doesn't add much, as it only removes the annoying profession lock that villagers have, this was mostly created just for me and some friends, but decided to upload it on Modrinth if anyone else wants that annoying profession lock removed.

I haven't properly tested it out on other versions or stuff like that, so if you find any bugs or glitches, let me know!
